Professor Layton and the Devil's Box

Guide Professor Layton through mysterious locations to uncover the truth behind the Devil's Box. Explore environments by navigating with arrow keys, collect Hint Coins hidden throughout each area, and solve increasingly challenging logic puzzles to progress. Use collected coins to purchase hints when puzzles become difficult. Complete all mandatory puzzles to unlock new story segments and reach the final revelation.

Arrow Keys: Move Professor Layton | Space: Interact with objects and submit puzzle solutions | Z: Use a Hint Coin (costs 1 coin) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Return to start screen
